reforms.description: Recent government initiatives have aimed to open up additional channels of finance for start-up companies in the context of the new Capitalizar programme, including business angels, venture capital, and mechanisms to securitise SME loans, with a focus on innovative and technology-based companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Broadening financing options for start-ups with innovative projects is expected to enhance investment and stimulate economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiatives are part of the ongoing Capitalizar programme aimed at supporting start-ups.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiatives represent a significant effort to enhance the financing landscape for start-ups, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic dynamism.
reforms.source_quote: Recent government initiatives have aimed to open up additional channels of finance for start-up companies in the context of the new Capitalizar programme.

reforms.description: Portugal's National Reform Programme aims to tackle structural constraints in productivity, competitiveness, and social cohesion, with specific measures defined in the areas of qualifications, innovation, and capitalisation of firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The programme supports the diversification of financing sources for companies, particularly young firms, which can enhance innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The NRP provides goals and a calendar for the implementation of a total of 140 measures.
reforms.importance_rationale: The NRP represents a comprehensive strategy for structural reform across multiple sectors, with significant potential to enhance productivity and competitiveness in the economy.
reforms.source_quote: Portugal’s National Reforms Programme (NRP) of April 2016 serves as a medium-term development strategy to tackle structural constraints in three main areas: productivity and competitiveness; indebtedness and social cohesion and reducing inequality.

reforms.description: The Portuguese authorities plan to reinforce the role of innovation centres (Centros de Interface Tecnológico, CIT) to enhance cooperation between academia and the business sector, including support for academic patenting and improving technology transfer offices (TTOs).
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the effectiveness of TTOs and CITs is expected to improve knowledge transfer and innovation outcomes, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The authorities plan to reinforce the role of innovation centres.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to improve the link between research and industry, which is crucial for enhancing innovation capacity in Portugal.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities plan to reinforce the role of innovation centres (Centros de Interface Tecnológico, CIT) which can play such a role.

reforms.description: Portugal plans to improve the links between researchers in universities and the private sector by considering allowing refunds of R&D tax credits for loss-making firms or extending the carry-forward period.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the connection between academia and industry can stimulate innovation and improve the commercialization of research outputs.
reforms.status_evidence: Plans to improve links between researchers and the private sector have been outlined.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant step towards enhancing collaboration between universities and the private sector, which is crucial for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Consider allowing refunds of research and development (R&D) tax credits for loss-making firms or extending the carry-forward period significantly.

reforms.description: Portugal's new tax allowance for corporate equity (ACE) aims to stimulate new investment by applying only to new equity investments, lifting previous restrictions that limited its effectiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The ACE is designed to reduce corporate leverage and encourage new equity investments, which can enhance business growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: Legislative changes came into effect in January 2017.
reforms.importance_rationale: The ACE represents a significant structural change in corporate taxation aimed at enhancing investment, which is crucial for economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: These legislative changes have also included the establishment of a tax allowance for corporate equity (ACE).

reforms.description: Portugal has made significant progress in reducing administrative burdens for businesses through the Simplex+2016 programme, which aims to simplify administrative procedures and consolidate various licensing processes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing red tape, the programme lowers costs for businesses, thereby increasing the return on investment and encouraging entrepreneurial activities.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been actively reducing administrative burdens for businesses.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant effort to streamline business processes, which can enhance the overall business environment and stimulate economic activity.
reforms.source_quote: Portugal has made strong progress in reducing administrative burdens for businesses.

reforms.description: Portugal introduced a training subsidy for both employees and job seekers to encourage participation in lifelong learning, covering costs for training hours.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The subsidy aims to reduce the financial barriers to training, thereby enhancing the skills of the workforce and improving productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The training subsidy was introduced in August 2015.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative addresses a significant barrier to skill development in the workforce, with potential positive impacts on productivity and employability.
reforms.source_quote: In August 2015, Portugal introduced a training subsidy for both employees and job seekers.

reforms.description: The National Programme for School Success aims to provide additional resources and training to local projects developed by schools in collaboration with municipalities, enhancing educational outcomes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving educational resources and training, the programme enhances the skills of teachers and students, which can lead to better economic outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme is actively providing resources and training to schools.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant effort to enhance educational quality and support, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The National Programme for School Success aims to provide additional resources to local projects developed by schools, in collaboration with municipalities.

reforms.description: A specific programme called 'Retomar' has been launched to provide financial support to students who have abandoned their studies and wish to re-enrol in tertiary education.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating re-enrolment in tertiary education, the programme aims to enhance the skill level of the workforce, which can contribute to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme is currently providing financial support to eligible students.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme addresses a critical barrier to education access, which is essential for improving human capital in the economy.
reforms.source_quote: A specific programme called 'Retomar' has been launched to provide financial support to those who have abandoned their studies and wish to re-enrol in tertiary education.

reforms.description: Portugal aims to strengthen the links between research and the business sector by providing better incentives for academics to cooperate with industry, addressing the low level of collaboration that limits innovation commercialization.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing collaboration between academia and industry is expected to lead to increased innovation and productivity through better commercialization of research.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation to strengthen links between research and business was made as part of the survey's findings.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant barrier to innovation in Portugal by promoting collaboration, which is crucial for enhancing the country's R&D performance.
reforms.source_quote: Strengthen the links between research and the business sector through better incentives for academics to cooperate with industry.
